name: testErrorMessageForExistedName
description: Verify the error message when attempting to create a Fraud Control with the existing name
descriptionHtml: Verify the error message when attempting to create a Fraud Control with the existing name

Fill in fraud control name: Test fraudControl name
Verify that the error message ‘ERROR Entity with name … already exists.’ is displayed.
